raw_consumer_statement:
I prepaid for a car rental. The car rental company was unable to place the reservation on my car rental member account so they offered to cancel it and re-do it at the same price and I agreed but the price was higher. When I arrived a the rental counter they furnished a lower category vehicle and latter charge me much more. 

I filed a dispute with American Express but they have not shown good faith resolving the problem. 

They refuse to assign a point of contact for me to communicate with me.
